topic.what: PASS: Provenanced Access Subaccount System replacing role/identity-based control with provenance-based control for blockchain wallets
topic.how: Inbox-Outbox mechanism with TEE enforcement ensures all assets have verifiable lineage from external deposits while internal transfers remain private and indistinguishable from standard EOAs
topic.why_matters: Bridges gap between strict self-custody and flexible shared access for AI agent wallets, enterprise payroll privacy, and consumer-grade applications requiring internal transfer privacy

characteristics.what_it_measures: Operations per second for wallet initialization
characteristics.vs_baseline: Intel TDX 2.3x faster than AWS Nitro
characteristics.evidence: Table 2 benchmark results, 100 operations x 10 trials
characteristics.context: Intel TDX leverages main processor instructions vs AWS Nitro disaggregated coprocessor design

characteristics.what_it_measures: Internal subaccount transfer operations per second
characteristics.vs_baseline: Intel TDX 2.2x faster than AWS Nitro
characteristics.evidence: Table 2 benchmark results, in-memory state changes within TEE
characteristics.context: Core PASS operation; both backends sustain high throughput for real-world deployment

characteristics.what_it_measures: Account balance query operations per second
characteristics.vs_baseline: Intel TDX 1.8x faster than AWS Nitro
characteristics.context: Read-heavy operation benefits from TEE in-memory access

characteristics.vs_baseline: Intel TDX 2.2x faster than AWS Nitro
characteristics.evidence: Table 2 benchmark results, comprehensive workflow test
characteristics.context: Complete user journey benchmark showing practical viability

characteristics.what_it_measures: Internal transfer invisibility to external observers
characteristics.evidence: Formal proof in Lean 4; internal transfers update only (L,H) never O or on-chain balances
characteristics.context: Corollary: PASS wallet external trace equals standard EOA trace when sharing pk, Outbox, per-asset totals

characteristics.what_it_measures: Conservation of asset totals across internal ledger and external deposits
characteristics.value: Σu L[u][α] = extDep(α) for all assets α
characteristics.vs_baseline: No asset creation or double-spending possible
characteristics.evidence: Proposition 3 proved via transition system induction on ClaimInbox, InternalTransfer, Withdraw
characteristics.context: Core security invariant ensuring asset accessibility and consistency

characteristics.evidence: Liquefaction requires external blockchain oracles for authorization; PASS executes internally in TEE
characteristics.context: Liquefaction is closes related work with published latency data
